title: schismus calycinus var. arabicus
intro: Schismus calycinus var. arabicus, commonly known as the sand grass or sand loving grass, is a type of grass species in the family Poaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Schismus calycinus var. arabicus include the treatment of digestive issues, fever reduction, and wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by infusing the dried grass in hot water or using it as a decoction to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
